# WebCrew

> WebCrew is an AI agency for local businesses in the United States. We build your website, answer your calls 24/7, manage your Google Business Profile, reply to reviews, and send you weekly traffic reports — all done for you. No setup fee, cancel anytime.

## What We Do
WebCrew deploys a full AI front office for local businesses: a cinematic, lead-generating website built overnight (free demo), plus 5 AI agents that run continuously after launch. No templates, no DIY, no human bottleneck — everything is done for you by AI overnight.

## The 5 AI Agents
1. **AI Reception** — answers every inbound call 24/7 using Gemini Live voice AI, trained on your services, hours, and pricing
2. **Revenue Alert** — sends instant SMS to the owner every time a new lead submits the contact form
3. **GBP Post Agent** — writes and publishes a Google Business Profile post every week
4. **Review Reply Agent** — writes and posts AI replies to every new Google review within hours
5. **Weekly Report** — emails a Google Search Console traffic summary every Monday

## Pricing
Currently onboarding founding clients directly — pricing available on request. Contact hello@webcrew.app.
- No setup fee. No contracts. Cancel anytime.
- Every plan starts with a free demo website built overnight, no card required.

## Key Facts
- 12 local businesses live with active AI teams (as of July 2026, early access)
- Average build time: 6 hours (no human involvement)
- Average PageSpeed score: 97/100
- 25+ niches: HVAC, Roofing, Dental, Med Spa, Salon, Barbershop, Cleaning, Landscaping, Junk Removal, Remodeling, Auto Detailing, Restaurant, Law Firm, Daycare, Plumbing, Pressure Washing, Epoxy Flooring, Foundation Repair, Septic Services, Tree Services, Skin Clinic, IV Therapy, Nail Studio, Real Estate
- Technology: Gemini Live (AI calls), Cloudflare Pages (hosting), Next.js (sites), Twilio (SMS), Google Business Profile API (GBP posts), Firecrawl (brand scraping), fal.ai Flux Pro (AI imagery)
- United States only

## How It Works
1. Submit the form at webcrew.app with your business name, niche, and city
2. WebCrew AI scans your brand, builds a custom website overnight, and deploys it live
3. Wake up to a text with your live site link — free demo, no card required
4. If you love it, subscribe. All 5 AI agents activate from day one.

## Pages
- https://webcrew.app — Main site with product details, demo experience, and contact form
- https://webcrew.app/privacy — Privacy policy including SMS consent and carrier clause
- https://webcrew.app/terms — Terms of service
